title: BEM-840 clean dispatch contour
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/dispatch_contour_archive/bem840']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
archive=Path('governance/dispatch_contour_archive/bem840')
move_specs=[
    ('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','queue'),
    ('governance/workflow_dispatch_results','results'),
    ('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid','invalid')]
archived=[]
for src,label in move_specs:
    s=Path(src)
    if s.exists():
        dest=archive/label
        dest.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
        for p in sorted(s.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                target=dest/p.name
                if target.exists():
                    target=dest/(p.stem+'_bem840'+p.suffix)
                shutil.move(str(p),str(target))
                archived.append({'from':str(p),'to':str(target)})
# Remove stale processor marker and direct fallback state only after archiving facts into report.
stale=[]
for f in ['governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json','governance/state/claude_direct_runtime_fallback_state.json']:
    p=Path(f)
    if p.exists():
        target=archive/(p.name+'.archived')
        shutil.move(str(p),str(target))
        stale.append({'from':str(p),'to':str(target)})
# Recreate clean dirs.
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_results','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'dispatch_contour_cleaned','archived_count':len(archived),'archived':archived,'stale_state_archived':stale,'clean_dirs':['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_results','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid'],'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_clean_dispatch_contour.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_clean_dispatch_contour.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Clean Dispatch Contour | CLEANED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: verify dispatch contour is empty, then create exactly one clean Claude dispatch queue item. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Dispatch contour cleaned safely by archiving queue/results/invalid/stale marker. Next: verify empty and create one clean dispatch item.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_clean_dispatch_contour.json','governance/reports/bem840_clean_dispatch_contour.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
for item in archived+stale:
    changed_files.append(item['to'])
ops_applied.append('Safely cleaned dispatch contour by archiving workflow dispatch queue, results, invalid queue files, and stale marker state; recreated clean contour directories')
"""
No issue comments.
